title: Tim's Blackpowder Weaponry
description: A content pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds various weapons from the black powder era, primarily focusing on the 18th century. (such as muskets)
body:
## One of the many content packs of Vic's Point Blank adds flintlock musket-related weapons into the main mod.

**This pack is in early development**, so expect some performance issues in-game.

# Pack's requirements: 
[Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank), along with [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) so that the main mod can work.

## Available weapons:
There will be more to come to the pack. The currently available weapons are:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Standard Musket along with its attachments and paper cartridge.

</details>

_The current known issues about the pack:_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Melee fire mode can still use ADS (Aim Down Sight) when it is not supposed to.
- Attacking in melee fire mode while aiming down sight will cause the range to be longer (**a lot** longer).
  + Apparently, this issue will occur when you use the content pack while having [Pointblank: Jelly](https://github.com/Corrinedev/pointblank-jelly), a Vic's Point Blank extension, due to a mechanic of changing how damage works (from hitscan to projectiles). The devs of Pb:J are currently working on fixing this. 
  + **If you want to remove this issue**, you can **remove Pb:J** and play the game normally while waiting for the fully released version of Pb:J.
- Various animations of the musket don't seem to behave as they are supposed to.

</details>

## Credits:

- Vic mod for his massive works on both the Vic's Point Blank and his community.
 
- A guy with the musket model on planet minecraft (I used the model as the base for the standard musket, but I can't find it again now :(. The closest I could find was [this one](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/musket-3d-model-bayonet/), but it was free instead.)

- B&I and G&B on Roblox for sound effects, along with inspiration for animations and guns.
